name: Roberta Oaks
tagline: Modern aloha wear designed and made in Honolulu — bold prints on classic silhouettes that locals actually wear to work.
bestTime: Weekdays for personal attention; check for new print drops on social media
talkStory: Designer Roberta Oaks launched her eponymous label in Chinatown, creating modern aloha wear with bold original prints designed in-house and sewn in Honolulu. Her designs have been worn by local newscasters, politicians, and musicians who want aloha shirts that aren't your grandfather's retiree uniform. The Chinatown shop doubles as her working studio, so you might see production happening behind the retail floor. Each print run is limited, making the pieces essentially wearable art.
